name: io.github.kaditang/agent-wallet-mcp
description: Non-custodial RWA + yield service for AI agents on Solana — compare USDC yields, quote/buy tokenized US stocks (Backed xStocks) and Ondo USDY treasuries. User signs in their own wallet; we never custody funds or co-sign.

environmentVariables.name: SOL_RPC
environmentVariables.description: Solana RPC URL (e.g. a Helius endpoint). Optional — falls back to public mainnet-beta if unset.
